name: Book Catalog
description: Browse and search the book inventory with filters for genre, author, price range, and availability.

name: Shopping Cart
description: Add books to cart, adjust quantities, apply discount codes, and proceed to checkout.

name: Order Management
description: Process orders through lifecycle: pending -> paid -> shipped -> delivered. Handles cancellations and refunds.

name: User Authentication
description: Email/password signup and login with JWT tokens. Password reset via email. Session management.

name: Inventory Tracking
description: Track stock levels per book. Auto-reorder alerts when stock drops below threshold. Warehouse location mapping.

name: Payment Processing
description: Stripe integration for credit card payments. Handles payment intents, webhooks, refunds, and receipt generation.

name: Book Reviews
description: Customers can rate books (1-5 stars) and write text reviews. Reviews are moderated before publishing.

name: Recommendation Engine
description: Suggests books based on purchase history, browsing behavior, and collaborative filtering with similar users.

name: Admin Dashboard
description: Internal tool for managing books, orders, users, and viewing sales analytics.

name: Email Notifications
description: Transactional emails for order confirmation, shipping updates, password reset, and promotional campaigns.
